prerequisites: A Fillout account with access to the Developer settings tab where API keys are generated.
A generated Fillout API key (the `api_key` config field, required).
A `start_date` value to set the earliest point from which form responses are synced (required config field).

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Fillout authenticates with a single API key. Generate it in the Developer settings tab of your Fillout account and provide it as the connector's `api_key` field. The REST API expects it in the request header as `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>`. You can revoke or regenerate the key from the dashboard at any time.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Fillout API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Fillout, open your account Settings, and go to the Developer settings tab. Generate and copy your API key there. You can revoke or regenerate this key from the dashboard at any time.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the copied key into the connector's required `api_key` field. The connector sends it to the Fillout REST API as the `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` header to authenticate requests.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required `start_date` field to the earliest date from which form response data should be synced. Records before this date are not retrieved.

sources.title: Fillout REST API documentation (Fillout Help Center)
Get forms - Fillout API reference (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>)
